message.content:
Thoroughly explore the collabspace-server project at D:/project/pt-gitlab/collabspace/collabspace-server/. I need to understand:

1. What tech stack it uses (language, framework, build tool)
2. How to build, run, test, and lint
3. The high-level architecture (modules, packages, key entry points)
4. Any configuration files (pom.xml, build.gradle, package.json, Makefile, docker-compose, etc.)
5. Key directories and their purposes

Read the README.md, any build config files, and explore the directory structure. Be very thorough - check for Maven/Gradle wrappers, Dockerfiles, application config files (application.yml, etc.).
